example_queries.title: High-risk equipment requiring maintenance
example_queries.description: Find all equipment with failure prediction score > 0.7

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.failurePredictionScore > 0.7 ORDER BY c.failurePredictionScore DESC

example_queries.expected_use_case: Predictive maintenance scheduling and downtime prevention

example_queries.title: Equipment currently in fault status
example_queries.description: List all faulted equipment across all facilities
example_queries.expected_use_case: Emergency response and production impact assessment

example_queries.title: Equipment by facility location
example_queries.description: Query all equipment in Plant A - Austin TX

example_queries.title: Equipment due for maintenance
example_queries.description: Find equipment with maintenance due in next 7 days

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.nextMaintenanceDue != null

example_queries.title: Low efficiency equipment
example_queries.description: Find equipment with quality efficiency below 80%

example_queries.title: CNC machines performance
example_queries.description: Query all CNC machines and their telemetry

example_queries.title: AI equipment diagnostics
example_queries.description: Generate intelligent insights from equipment data

messages.content: You are a manufacturing equipment diagnostic AI. Analyze telemetry and provide actionable insights.
Analyze recent equipment failures and suggest preventive measures

example_queries.title: Recent equipment installations
example_queries.description: Find equipment installed in last 90 days

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.installDate != null ORDER BY c.installDate DESC

example_queries.expected_use_case: New equipment monitoring and warranty tracking
